Class InfFlowContractAppTaclet

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.rules.Taclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.Taclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.FindTaclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.RewriteTaclet
de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.InfFlowContractAppTaclet
All Implemented Interfaces:
Rule, HasOrigin, Named, Rule
public class InfFlowContractAppTaclet extends RewriteTaclet
A normal RewriteTaclet except that the formula which is added by this taclet is also added to the list of formulas contained in the INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY. The INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY is used by the macros UseInformationFlowContractMacro and PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro to decide how to prepare the formulas resulting from information flow contract applications.
